name: Tex-Mex Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch frying pan, combine the water, onion, and garlic. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to simmer, cover, and cook for 5 minutes until onions are tender.
3. Stir in the beans, tomato sauce, green chilies, chili powder, and salt.
4. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes to heat all ingredients.
5. In a separate bowl, combine cornstarch with 1 tbsp of water to form a smooth paste.
6. Stir the paste into the frying pan while stirring to thicken the sauce.
